name: h200_56gpu_dgx_multibox
_comment: NVIDIA HGX/DGX Hopper Refresh H200 multi-box deployment: 7 8-GPU boxes (7×8 = 56 GPU topology, 56 GPUs in active use). Intra-box: NVLink4 900 GB/s bidir (450 GB/s single-direction) per GPU through 4 NVSwitch chips. Inter-box: ConnectX-7 NDR InfiniBand (400 Gbps = 50 GB/s single-direction per GPU through dedicated NIC), ~2.5 μs IB transport latency. A collective ≤8 ranks stays on nvlink4; collectives spanning 56 ranks escalate to ib (paying α = 1.0 + 2.5 = 3.5 us and being bandwidth-floored to 50 GB/s). Same chip as h200.8gpu single-box spec.
